memory_entries.text: SQLite product DB structure: g1 is primarily Office Products (items_g1 has rtg_ct, prc real; fdbk_stats_g1 review_ct); g2 is Electronics (items_g2 columns ref_id, ttl, avg_rtg, prc integer cents, prc_usd real, str_nm, main_cat, feat_lst, img_ct; reviews in fdbk_g2 with ref_id); g3 appears Musical Instruments (items_g3 has rtg_ct, prc real). For electronics zero-review price-listed query: count items_g2 with no fdbk_g2 rows; use prc non-NULL and non-zero as listed price (prc_usd is derived and missing for 142 prc-only cases).
